name: Victoria Pineapple
steps: Bring water, Galabex sugar, syrup, crushed lemongrass, grated vanilla pods, chopped kaffir lime leaves, and Java pepper to boil.
Cool down and bag with all the spices. Leave to infuse 30 mins. Add all the juice and the rum.
For half a pineapple get 150g of butter in a pan with 3 Java pepper, 2 kaffir lime leaves, 1/4 of lemongrass and half the vanilla pod.
Place 1/4 of pineapple and baste it with the butter.
Put the pan in the oven at 160C for 5 mins.
Take it and check for liquor. On stove keep on basting the pineapple.
Again in the oven for another 5 mins.
Check if it's cooked. Then leave to rest on a cooling rack tray.
Pass the excess of cooking liquor and keep it for service.
Spice the vanilla. Java pepper, kaffir lime leaves and lemongrass in the oven 3 mins, baste and dry on a jay-cloth.
The roasted pineapple is meant to be sent warm.
Add agar and gellan and cook for 1 min.
Leave to cool down in container and pass.

other_details.notes: The roasted pineapple is meant to be sent warm.
